Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Difite.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Suzhou Difite Filter Technology Co., Ltd. presents a highly active, specialized manufacturing profile, despite a glaring official misclassification as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer'. A workforce of 87 insured employees operating out of a multi-floor facility ('3rd Floor North Zone and 4th Floor, Plant C') in the Suzhou Industrial Park definitively precludes the manufacturing of entire automobiles, which requires massive ground-level assembly infrastructure. Instead, physical evidence and its business scope perfectly align to identify it as a specialized Tier-2/Tier-3 auto parts manufacturer. Difite focuses on the R&D and production of automotive and engine filtration systems, fuel pumps, and related plastic/hydraulic components. Furthermore, its digital footprint reveals a highly professional, standardized corporate IT infrastructure (@difite.com), signaling a mature enterprise actively engaged in global supply chains.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 73)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SPECIALIZED AUTO PARTS MANUFACTURER
